root.name: Add explanatory text box to Slide 11 about cumulative rainfall chart
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent correctly adds a text box to Slide 11 that explains the chart shows cumulative rainfall over the storm period, ensuring clear, relevant, and non-intrusive placement.

children.name: Text box added to Slide 11
children.description: Checks that a new text box has been added to Slide 11.

children.name: Text box content explains the chart shows cumulative rainfall over the storm period
children.description: Checks that the new text box contains an explanation referencing cumulative rainfall and the storm period in relation to the chart.

children.name: Explanatory text box is not obscuring chart or other slide content
children.description: Ensures the new text box does not visually block the chart or other important content on the slide.

children.name: No extraneous modifications to Slide 11
children.description: Checks that only the relevant text box has been added and no unrelated changes were made to Slide 11 (e.g., chart was not deleted, styling not unnecessarily changed).

children.name: No Extraneous Changes to Other Slides
children.description: Verify that only slide 11 has been modified, and no other slides have been added or removed.

metadata.task: Slide 11: Add a text box explaining that this chart shows cumulative rainfall over the storm period
